scripts.api-client:generate: pnpm openapi:generate && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/api-client exec node scripts/generate-client.mjs
scripts.build: pnpm topology:build && pnpm tokens:build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/content-registry build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/ui-foundation build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/design-foundation-preview build
scripts.uiux:review:foundation: node tools/ui-ux-pro-max/run.mjs --label foundation-review --domain ux --stack react --query "Warm Care Grid healthcare product foundation accessible motion content hierarchy privacy-preserving provider disclosure no dashboard imitation"
scripts.design:verify: pnpm tokens:build && pnpm tokens:check && pnpm content:validate && pnpm ui:build && pnpm ui:test && pnpm uiux:check && pnpm ui:test:browser && pnpm ui:test:a11y
scripts.topology:build: pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/api build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/worker build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/patient-web build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/provider-web build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/organization-web build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/admin-web build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/mobile build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/api-client build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/config build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/database build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/domain build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/observability build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/platform-adapters build && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/testing-factories build
scripts.topology:typecheck: pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/worker typecheck && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/patient-web typecheck && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/provider-web typecheck && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/organization-web typecheck && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/admin-web typecheck && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/mobile typecheck && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/api-client typecheck && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/config typecheck && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/database typecheck && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/domain typecheck && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/observability typecheck && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/platform-adapters typecheck && pnpm --filter @nelyohealth/testing-factories typecheck
scripts.deps:verify: pnpm deps:policy && pnpm deps:licenses && pnpm deps:inventory
scripts.repository:verify: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:contract && pnpm test:integration && pnpm infra:verify && pnpm test:browser && pnpm test:a11y && pnpm test:visual && pnpm build && pnpm secret:scan && pnpm community:verify && pnpm actions:verify && pnpm deps:verify && pnpm changeset:status && pnpm release:check
